title: delphinium mairei var. viride
intro: Delphinium mairei var. viride, also known as the Green Delphinium, is a variety of the Delphinium mairei plant, a flowering perennial that belongs to the buttercup family. The medicinal properties of Delphinium mairei var. viride include its ability to act as an expectorant and its anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve congestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Delphinium mairei var. viride can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions when used under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
